publicReports.title: Public Game Reports
publicReports.emptyDesc: When enabled, visitors can submit game scores from the league website.
publicReports.revertDescription: This will undo the submitted score and set the game back to scheduled. The standings will be recalculated.
publicReports.publicReportNotice: This game was completed via a public submission.

settingsPublicReports.title: Public Game Reports
settingsPublicReports.description: Allow visitors to submit game scores from the public league website.
settingsPublicReports.enableDescription: When enabled, visitors can submit scores for scheduled games.
settingsPublicReports.requireEmailDescription: Send a 6-digit OTP code to the submitter's email. Strongly recommended for preventing abuse.
settingsPublicReports.botDetectionDescription: Show a math captcha and use hidden honeypot fields to block automated submissions.
